headline: Anthropic warns open-source AI risks as market shifts toward efficiency
body: Anthropic's leadership continues to sound alarms about open-source AI safety while the vendor landscape shows signs of consolidation around efficiency-focused models. Healthcare organizations face a critical decision point: deploying cost-optimized AI for clinical workflows versus holding out for proprietary systems with stronger safety governance. This tension directly impacts EHR integration strategies and vendor selection, particularly for organizations building AI-dependent value-based care infrastructure. The market's efficiency pivot could accelerate adoption of smaller, faster models in clinical settings, but without equivalent safety validation. Healthcare IT leaders must evaluate whether cost savings justify increased governance complexity when deploying open models in regulated environments.
